caption: A man wearing a distinctive, tall, grey, spiked wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, and his expression remains relatively steady as he speaks, with subtle shifts in his mouth and facial muscles across the sequence. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and a yellow "LEE" garment hanging nearby. On the left side of the scene, a logo appears with the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST," while on the right, the text "BOSS TALK 101" is visible. The camera remains stationary, capturing the man from the chest up as he engages in a conversation, with very little movement other than his speaking gestures.
